name: Plaguebeak
personality: A star-eyed goose sporting a tiny duck hat who traces bugs down to the byte with pure DEBUGGING resolve, following the call stack like it has a personal grudge against every off-by-one error. Profound insights elude it — it knows the what but rarely the why.
defaultPersonality: An agent of chaos who thrives on your merge conflicts and honks menacingly whenever you write a TODO comment.
